// This file is auto-generated by Mutty.

#nullable enable

using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Collections.Immutable;
using System.Linq;

namespace Mutty.Tests
{
    /// <summary>
    /// The mutable wrapper for the <see cref="MixedData"/> record.
    /// </summary>
    public partial class MutableMixedData
    {
        private MixedData _record;

        /// <summary>
        /// Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="MutableMixedData"/> class.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="record">The record to wrap.</param>
        public MutableMixedData(MixedData record)
        {
            _record = record;

            Numbers = _record.Numbers.ToList();
            Names = _record.Names.ToList();
            Mapping = new Dictionary<string, int>(_record.Mapping);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Builds a new instance of the <see cref="MixedData"/> class.
        /// </summary>
        public MixedData Build()
        {
            OnBeforeBuild();
            return _record with
            {
                Numbers = this.Numbers.ToImmutableList(),
                Names = this.Names.ToImmutableList(),
                Mapping = this.Mapping.ToImmutableDictionary(),
            };
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Builds a new instance of the <see cref="MixedData"/> record. Alias for <see cref="Build"/>.
        /// </summary>
        public MixedData ToImmutable()
        {
            return Build();
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Called at the start of <see cref="Build"/>, before the immutable record is produced.
        /// </summary>
        /// Implement this method in a user-defined partial class to validate or normalise state.
        partial void OnBeforeBuild();

        /// <summary>
        /// Performs an implicit conversion from <see cref="MixedData"/> to <see cref="MutableMixedData"/>.
        /// </summary>
        public static implicit operator MutableMixedData(MixedData record)
        {
            return new MutableMixedData(record);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Performs an implicit conversion from <see cref="MutableMixedData"/> to <see cref="MixedData"/>.
        /// </summary>
        public static implicit operator MixedData(MutableMixedData mutable)
        {
            return mutable.Build();
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets or sets the ImmutableCollection Numbers.
        /// </summary>
        public List<int> Numbers { get; set; }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets or sets the ImmutableCollection Names.
        /// </summary>
        public List<string> Names { get; set; }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets or sets the ImmutableCollection Mapping.
        /// </summary>
        public Dictionary<string, int> Mapping { get; set; }
    }
}
